mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, equipment_serial_no, financial_system_unique_id, his_system_unique_id, category68_id, category68_code, category68_archive_no, name, name_pinyin, spec, model, register_cert_no, brand_id, brand_name, manufacturer_id, manufacturer_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, serial_number, unit, original_value, net_value, dept_id, dept_name, storage_place, acceptance_date, storage_date, manufacture_date, scrap_date, expected_scrap_date, asset_category_id, asset_category_name, measuring_category_id, measuring_category_name, calibration_cycle_days, last_calibration_date, next_calibration_date, use_status, use_status_name, label_print_status, label_print_time, repair_status, repair_status_name, warranty_days, warranty_start_time, warranty_end_time, warranty_type, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sb_customer_asset_ledger
mapper.select:
(del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') or name_pinyin like concat('%', #{name}, '%')) and category68_id = #{category68Id} and equipment_serial_no like concat('%', #{equipmentSerialNo}, '%') and category68_archive_no like concat('%', #{category68ArchiveNo}, '%') and spec like concat('%', #{spec}, '%') and model like concat('%', #{model}, '%') and (brand_name like concat('%', #{brandKeyword}, '%') or brand_id in (select id from sb_equipment_brand where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and (name like concat('%', #{brandKeyword}, '%') or (name_pinyin is not null and name_pinyin like concat('%', #{brandKeyword}, '%'))))) and (manufacturer_name like concat('%', #{manufacturerKeyword}, '%') or manufacturer_id in (select id from sb_equipment_manufacturer where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and (name like concat('%', #{manufacturerKeyword}, '%') or (name_pinyin is not null and name_pinyin like concat('%', #{manufacturerKeyword}, '%'))))) and (supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or supplier_id in (select id from sb_equipment_supplier where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and (name like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%') or (name_pinyin is not null and name_pinyin like concat('%', #{supplierKeyword}, '%'))))) and use_status = #{useStatus}
order by create_time desc
where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and equipment_serial_no = #{equipmentSerialNo} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) limit 1
where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and dept_id = #{deptId} order by equipment_serial_no

where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
and category68_id in #{id}
and 1=0
order by category68_code, equipment_serial_no
where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and storage_place = #{storagePlace} order by equipment_serial_no

select distinct storage_place from sb_customer_asset_ledger where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and storage_place is not null and storage_place != '' order by storage_place

select ifnull(max(cast(equipment_serial_no as unsigned)), 0) from sb_customer_asset_ledger where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and equipment_serial_no regexp '^[0-9]+$'

select ifnull(max(cast(substring_index(category68_archive_no, '-', -1) as unsigned)), 0) from sb_customer_asset_ledger where customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and category68_id = #{category68Id} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) and category68_archive_no is not null and category68_archive_no != '' and category68_archive_no like '%-%'
mapper.insert: insert into sb_customer_asset_ledger (id, customer_id, equipment_serial_no, financial_system_unique_id, his_system_unique_id, category68_id, category68_code, category68_archive_no, name, name_pinyin, spec, model, register_cert_no, brand_id, brand_name, manufacturer_id, manufacturer_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, serial_number, unit, original_value, net_value, dept_id, dept_name, storage_place, acceptance_date, storage_date, manufacture_date, scrap_date, expected_scrap_date, asset_category_id, asset_category_name, measuring_category_id, measuring_category_name, calibration_cycle_days, last_calibration_date, next_calibration_date, use_status, use_status_name, label_print_status, label_print_time, repair_status, repair_status_name, warranty_days, warranty_start_time, warranty_end_time, warranty_type, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{equipmentSerialNo}, #{financialSystemUniqueId}, #{hisSystemUniqueId}, #{category68Id}, #{category68Code}, #{category68ArchiveNo}, #{name}, #{namePinyin}, #{spec}, #{model}, #{registerCertNo}, #{brandId}, #{brandName}, #{manufacturerId}, #{manufacturerName}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{serialNumber}, #{unit}, #{originalValue}, #{netValue}, #{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{storagePlace}, #{acceptanceDate}, #{storageDate}, #{manufactureDate}, #{scrapDate}, #{expectedScrapDate}, #{assetCategoryId}, #{assetCategoryName}, #{measuringCategoryId}, #{measuringCategoryName}, #{calibrationCycleDays}, #{lastCalibrationDate}, #{nextCalibrationDate}, #{useStatus}, #{useStatusName}, #{labelPrintStatus}, #{labelPrintTime}, #{repairStatus}, #{repairStatusName}, #{warrantyDays}, #{warrantyStartTime}, #{warrantyEndTime}, #{warrantyType}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
